[[File:Nazar boncuğu.jpg|thumb|Nazars, the symbol of the Omega Priesthood]]
The [[Omega Priesthood]] is one of the three [[Priesthood|Priesthoods]] alongside the [[Alpha Priesthood]] and the [[Lambda Priesthood]].

The Omega Priesthood serves a primary purpose promoting the Omega Covenant. So promoting [[Gezelligheid]] and [[marketing]] through means such as [[Internet memes]] and other forms of [[propaganda]].

They also serve a purpose of reducing [[envy]] and the [[evil eye]] across society.

{{Priestly Lineages}}
[[Category:Priesthood]]
[[sn:Omega priesthood]][[Category:Omega]]
[[Category:Omega Priesthood]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
